chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No.D-1348 of 2024 Date Order with signature of Judge Application in disposed of case. 1. For hearing of CMA No.8347/2025 (u/s 151 CPC) 21.01.2026 Mr. Muhammad Nasir Malik, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Ali Raza Balouch Additional Advocate General along with Kashif Hussain Memon AEO (ESHS) Sukkur at DEO (ESHS) Sukkur. Shuja Muhammad Phul, XEN Education Works Sukkur..-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- The petition was disposed of with directions to respondent No.5 to ensure that the basic requirements were made available at Government Boys Higher Secondary School, Darawahan, Taluka Rohri, District Sukkur. Today, compliance reports have been filed by the District Education Officer (Elementary Secondary and Higher Secondary, Sukkur) and the Chief Engineer, Education Works Region, Sukkur, which reflect that progress has been made with respect to the work at the said school. Therefore, in view of compliance, listed application is disposed of accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE S.Nawaz(St)’
